user_query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.

plan.query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
plan.reasoning: The task requires checking for emails received in the past week and retrieving relevant details such as sender and subject. The graph agent is suitable for accessing email data.

steps.task: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days and include the sender and subject fields.

plan.synthesis: Extract the sender and subject information from the results of step 1 and present them as a list.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days and include the sender and subject fields.
